visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a black t-shirt and glasses stands in an office-like setting with white walls and curtains. He holds a white box containing four colorful cupcakes, gesturing with his hands as he speaks directly to the camera. (2) The camera transitions to a top-down close-up of a colorful box resting on a wooden desk; the box features a cartoon birthday cake design with labels for a 20th anniversary. A hand enters the frame, pointing at various cartoon character illustrations on the box lid. (3) The box lid is slid open to reveal four cupcakes with swirl frosting in green, white, pink, and beige colors, nestled in cardboard holders. The camera pans slightly to show the variety of flavors. (4) A pair of hands holds a set of small metal spoons sealed in plastic packaging, with the open cupcake box still visible in the background on the desk. (5) A finger points to each of the four cupcakes individually in a close-up shot, emphasizing the different frosting textures and colors. (6) The scene shifts to a different man wearing a grey t-shirt with a blue cat graphic, sitting at an office desk. He is seen taking a bite of the green-frosted cupcake using a small spoon, while another person is partially visible in the background. (7) The man in the grey shirt holds a pink cupcake while a person off-camera (the first man in the black shirt) takes a sample. They are in a well-lit office with computers and laptops visible on the desks behind them. (8) The final sequence returns to the colorful box lid where small cardboard character standees are being inserted into designated slots. The camera zooms in to show the details of the 'MapleStory' characters.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 新楓之谷為慶祝20週年. [Logo]: @HanHan. (2) [Subtitle]: 跟紅葉蛋糕推出了20週年聯名合作杯子蛋糕. (3) [Subtitle]: 不管是草莓口味還是白巧克力口味都阿娜達. (4) [Subtitle]: oh my god我們收到楓之谷寄來的蛋糕. (5) [Subtitle]: 超級可愛的你看這個外盒. (6) [Subtitle]: 藍寶在喝這個嗯應該是奶茶吧. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後還有綠水靈還有雪吉拉還有那個皮卡啾的那個氣球. (8) [Subtitle]: 卡哇伊啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 這一次是跟紅葉蛋糕合作啊. [Variety]: (叫屁). (10) [Subtitle]: 天吶太高揭了吧. (11) [Subtitle]: 而且有點粘到哎哈哈哈. (12) [Subtitle]: 而且他這次還有那個附贈就是不鏽鋼的那個湯匙. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後上面也是那個新楓之谷20週年的樣子哦. (14) [Subtitle]: 我猜這個應該是抹茶口味的. (15) [Subtitle]: 這個應該是奶油口味的. (16) [Subtitle]: 這個應該芝麻奶油口味的. (17) [Subtitle]: 你是直的嗎. (18) [Subtitle]: 嗯橫的. (19) [Subtitle]: 欸要拍直的. [Variety]: (三秒定律). (20) [Subtitle]: 是抹茶口味哦. (21) [Subtitle]: ストロベリーフレイバーよりもあなた. (22) [Subtitle]: (等待學長試吃感想). (23) [Subtitle]: 蠻好吃的哈哈哈. (24) [Subtitle]: 新楓之谷20週年生日快樂來我們來唱一首生日快樂歌. (25) [Subtitle]: 祝你生日快樂. (26) [Subtitle]: 哇楓之谷生日快樂.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main presenters and one colleague visible in the office background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One male has short brown hair, wears glasses and a black crew-neck t-shirt. The second male has short black hair and wears a grey t-shirt featuring a blue cartoon cat graphic.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor office space containing desks with laptops, monitors, office chairs, and white walls. Some windows are covered with white vertical blinds.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator speaks in Traditional Chinese over a bright, upbeat synthesized background track. The voice is enthusiastic with clear articulation. Minor sounds of box handling are audible. (2) The narrative continues with an exclamation of 'Oh my god,' followed by the crisp sound of cardboard sliding and paper rustling as a box is opened. The BGM maintains a steady, happy major-key tempo. (3) A sharp 'Ah!' vocal sound effect punctuates the discovery of the cupcakes. The speaker’s tone shifts to one of playful delight while describing the flavors. (4) Background noises include the distinct crinkling of plastic spoon packaging. The narrator's speech rate remains fast and engaging. (5) A second male voice enters the mix, sounding casual and conversational. Sounds of a spoon hitting a container and chewing are followed by communal laughter and appreciative murmurs. (6) A playful Japanese phrase is spoken by one of the males, adding a comedic element. The sound of collective light laughter from at least three individuals is heard. (7) The first narrator returns, leading a cheerful rendition of the 'Happy Birthday' song. The audio ends with a burst of group cheering and rhythmic hand clapping as the music reaches its peak.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Unboxing -> Product Detail -> Tasting -> Celebration
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To announce and review a 20th-anniversary collaboration between the game MapleStory and Hong Ye Cake, showcasing the special packaging, merchandise, and food items in a celebratory manner.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, naming of the brands MapleStory and Hong Ye Cake, and unboxing of promotional items.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes fast-paced editing and social media tropes like high-arousal narration and on-screen subtitles to promote a limited-time brand collaboration.
